benefits.description: Appetite suppression; weight loss breakthrough after stalling on Tirzepatide with Retatrutide addition; appetite suppression returned upon cycling back to Semaglutide
Reduced alcohol cravings and binge drinking; no longer self-medicating with alcohol in social situations

side_effects.description: BPC-157 and TB-500 seemed to make her short tempered and on edge, though confounded by father's death during same period
Burps returned when cycling back to Semaglutide (used as indicator of efficacy)

protocol_notes: Started Semaglutide at med spa ($600/month). Switched to Tirzepatide from online research sources after stalling for 6 months; noted no weight loss on Tirzepatide without strict protocol. Added Retatrutide to break stall, then developed tolerance. Cycled back to Semaglutide at lower dose. Also experimenting with BPC-157, TB-500, NAD+, and GHK-Cu. Previously on Phentermine and caffeine-aspirin-bronkaid stack. Post-mommy makeover surgery (2021) weight regain. Recently diagnosed with ADHD and started proper medical management. Father died during peptide use period (confounding factor for mood effects).
